label: Pointer / Mouse Parallax Hook
summary: Pointer-driven parallax hook usable from both DOM layers and React Three Fiber scenes. Provides usePointerParallax(targetRef) returning a ref-stable pointer position normalized to the target's bounding box, plus a PointerParallaxLayer wrapper for plain DOM transforms. Honors prefers-reduced-motion by freezing pointer to (0, 0). Use for hero hover-tilt cards, layered illustration depth, and sharing pointer state with three-fiber-canvas scenes.
notes: Sibling of scroll-parallax. Both target the parallax-* capability namespace. The hook returns a MutableRefObject so consumers can read pointer state inside useFrame (R3F) without triggering React re-renders — bridge to three-fiber-canvas dossier when 3D pointer-parallax is requested.
